name: 47_Network_Traffic_Analysis_KMeans_NetworkTraffic_ML
query: Tengeneza mfumo wa uchambuzi wa trafiki ya mtandao kwa kutumia algoriti ya K-means clustering na seti ya data ya Network Intrusion (CIC-IDS-2017) kutoka Kaggle. Pakia seti ya data na sanifisha data ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko katika kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tekeleza algoriti ya K-means clustering katika `src/model.py`. Tathmini makundi kwa kutumia kipimo cha silhouette na hifadhi matokeo ya tathmini chini ya `results/metrics/`. Hifadhi matokeo ya clustering kama `results/clustering_results.txt`. Onyesha matokeo ya clustering na hifadhi picha kama `results/figures/network_traffic_visualization.png`. Tengeneza dashibodi ya mwingiliano na Dash au Bokeh ili kuchunguza matokeo ya clustering, na hifadhi dashibodi chini ya `results/`. Hakikisha mfumo ni wa kimoduli ili mtumiaji aweze kubadilisha algoriti ya clustering haraka.

requirements.criteria: "Network Intrusion dataset (CIC-IDS-2017)" kutoka Kaggle imepakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Data imesanifishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko katika kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
"Silhouette coefficient" inatumika kwa tathmini. Matokeo ya tathmini yamehifadhiwa chini ya `results/metrics/`.
Matokeo ya clustering yamechapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/clustering_results.txt`.
Clustering ya trafiki ya mtandao imeonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/network_traffic_visualization.png`.
Dashibodi ya mwingiliano kwa kutumia "Dash" au "Bokeh" imetengenezwa kuonyesha matokeo ya clustering na kuhifadhiwa chini ya `results/`.

preferences.criteria: Dashibodi inapaswa kuruhusu watumiaji kuchuja na kuchunguza makundi maalum kwa uchambuzi wa kina.
Michoro inapaswa kutofautisha wazi kati ya makundi tofauti, ikifanya iwe rahisi kutambua mifumo katika data ya trafiki ya mtandao.
Mradi unapaswa kuwa wa kimoduli, kuruhusu mtumiaji kubadilisha algoriti ya clustering kwa urahisi.

judge_stats.criteria: "Network Intrusion dataset (CIC-IDS-2017)" kutoka Kaggle imepakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder/stub implementation. The `load_dataset()` function does not actually load the CIC-IDS-2017 dataset — it simply returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` with no real data loading logic. There is no code to read CSV files, connect to Kaggle API, or process any actual network traffic data. The file is explicitly labeled as a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" rather than a functional implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Data imesanifishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko katika kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder/stub implementation. The `load_dataset()` function simply returns a dictionary with a string `"loaded"` and some notes, while `build_transforms()` returns a list of strings like `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]`. There is no actual data standardization/normalization code implemented (e.g., no use of `StandardScaler`, `MinMaxScaler`, or any other scaling mechanism from scikit-learn or similar libraries). The file explicitly states it is a "Minimal semantic implementation" placeholder, meaning no real feature standardization logic exists.

<UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not contain an actual implementation of the K-means clustering algorithm. Instead, it only contains a placeholder/stub code that lists K-means as a keyword in `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` and `KEYWORDS` lists, and a `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder. There is no actual K-means implementation (e.g., no use of `sklearn.cluster.KMeans`, no custom K-means logic, no fitting of data, no cluster assignments). The file appears to be a minimal semantic stub created for benchmark judging purposes rather than a real implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: "Silhouette coefficient" inatumika kwa tathmini. Matokeo ya tathmini yamehifadhiwa chini ya `results/metrics/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The project structure shows that `results/metrics/` directory exists but is empty (no files listed within it). Neither `data_loader.py` nor `model.py` contains any implementation of Silhouette coefficient evaluation — both files are minimal placeholder stubs with no actual clustering evaluation logic. The `clustering_results.txt` file exists under `results/` but there is no evidence it contains Silhouette coefficient metrics. No code computes or saves Silhouette scores to `results/metrics/`.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya clustering yamechapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/clustering_results.txt`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/clustering_results.txt` exists but its content is merely a placeholder string `('placeholder\r\n', None)` rather than actual clustering results. This indicates that real K-Means clustering was never performed and no meaningful results (such as cluster assignments, centroids, silhouette scores, or cluster statistics) were saved to the file.

judge_stats.criteria: Clustering ya trafiki ya mtandao imeonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/network_traffic_visualization.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Faili `results/figures/network_traffic_visualization.png` ipo katika muundo wa mradi, lakini maudhui yake yanaonyesha hitilafu ya kusoma picha (`Error reading image file`). Hitilafu hii inaonyesha kwamba picha haiwezi kuthibitishwa kuwa na maudhui sahihi ya uonyeshaji wa clustering ya trafiki ya mtandao. Kwa hivyo, hitaji la kuonyesha na kuhifadhi clustering halijatimizwa kikamilifu.

judge_stats.criteria: Dashibodi ya mwingiliano kwa kutumia "Dash" au "Bokeh" imetengenezwa kuonyesha matokeo ya clustering na kuhifadhiwa chini ya `results/`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

Hakuna ushahidi wowote wa dashibodi ya mwingiliano iliyoundwa kwa kutumia `Dash` au `Bokeh`. Faili zilizopo (`src/data_loader.py` na `src/model.py`) ni "placeholder" tu zenye maelezo ya msingi, bila msimbo wowote unaohusiana na ujenzi wa dashibodi. Muundo wa mradi unaonyesha kwamba saraka ya `results/` ina faili moja tu (`clustering_results.txt`) na picha moja (`network_traffic_visualization.png`), lakini hakuna faili yoyote inayohusiana na dashibodi ya `Dash` au `Bokeh`. Trajekta pia inathibitisha kwamba kazi hii haijatekelezwa kabisa.
